programme.title: 🌊 3.7m @ 10s CROSS

With that onshore breeze, Lagide's 2.9m swell is likely just a closeout rodeo today.
🌊 Swell: 2.9m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 7.0km/h NE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 3.0m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.0m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.8m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.8m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.8m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
